# Feature: VisuDevGraph DTO (Slice 1) + Fact Mapper (Slice 2)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-07 -->

## Intent

Introduce `VisuDevGraph` as the canonical Blueprint analysis graph IR and populate it from `CodeFact[]` via `fact-graph.mapper.ts`. `BlueprintDocument` gains optional `graph` while all legacy report fields remain for UI backward compatibility.

Roadmap: visudev-graph-ir — slices 1–2

## Preconditions

- Blueprint pipeline (`analyzeFromFileEntries`) operational
- Fact extractors produce `CodeFact[]` with known kinds

## Happy Path

- [x] `VisuDevGraph` DTO defines nodes, edges, evidence, findings, scopes
- [x] `BlueprintDocument.graph?: VisuDevGraph` is optional
- [x] Pipeline attaches `graph` after facts/concepts/policies
- [x] Every input fact produces at least one `VisuDevEvidence`
- [x] `api-route` fact → route node in graph
- [x] `db-read`/`db-write` → table node + read/write edge
- [x] Validation/auth/external-api facts → corresponding nodes + edges
- [x] Route scopes appear as `VisuDevScope` with `kind: "route"`

## Edge Cases

- [x] No routes → empty scopes[], evidence still from facts
- [x] Duplicate table access → single table node, multiple evidence ids
- [x] Legacy consumers ignoring `graph` → unchanged behavior

## Regression

- [x] `fact-extractors.test.ts` still passes
- [x] Existing `routes`, `securityMatrix`, `findings` unchanged in pipeline output

## Assumptions

- `graph.findings[]` empty until slice 7
- UI does not read `graph` yet

## Implementation Notes

- **DTO:** `src/supabase/functions/visudev-analyzer/module/dto/graph/visudev-graph.dto.ts` — `VisuDevNodeKind`, `VisuDevEdgeKind`, `DetectionState`, `VisuDevGraph` and related interfaces
- **BlueprintDocument:** optional `graph?: VisuDevGraph` in `blueprint-document.dto.ts`; all legacy fields preserved
- **Mapper:** `module/blueprint/graph/fact-graph.mapper.ts` — `buildVisuDevGraphFromFacts(facts, routeScopes)`
- **Pipeline:** `blueprint-pipeline.service.ts` calls mapper after concepts/policies; attaches `graph` to returned document
- **Export:** `dto/index.ts` re-exports graph DTO
- **Tests:** `fact-graph.mapper.test.ts` (3 cases) + existing `fact-extractors.test.ts` (2 cases) — all pass via `deno test`
- **Checks:** `npm run checks` passed (format, lint, typecheck, vitest, build, deno fmt, deno lint)
- **Deferred:** slices 4–8 (execution graph, AppFlow bridge, matrix/findings from graph, AST)
